steps.t: Barían can be found in the Masons' Quarter in Dol Amroth. You should bring Rhovendol's poem to Barían.
Barían's sample of stonework can be found in a wheelbarrow in the Scholar's Quarter. You should lift the stonework and carry it to Master Laegened, so…
Laegened is in the Mason's Quarter in Dol Amroth. You should speak with Laegened.
Barían can be found in the Mason's Quarter in Dol Amroth. You should tell Barían the good news.
Rhovendol is in the Scholar's Quarter of Dol Amroth. You should tell Rhovendol that Barían is not interested in him.
